page.heroParagraph: Three steps. Your voice. Scientifically designed to rewire the subconscious patterns that shape who you are, and who you're becoming.
page.socialProof: Join {count} people already transforming their minds
page.sectionTitle: Three steps to a new you
page.sectionParagraph: No forms. No scripts. No production skills. Just a conversation that becomes your daily practice.
page.step1Desc: You don't fill out a form. You have a conversation. A conversational AI guides you through your specific challenges, goals, and emotional context. The things a template could never capture.
page.step1Detail: The AI asks the right follow-up questions. It adapts to what you share. By the end of the conversation, it has everything it needs to create something deeply personal.
page.step2Desc: Your practice is scripted around your exact situation, not generic wisdom. Then it's voiced using your cloned voice (from a 60-second recording) or a professional voice you choose.
page.step2Detail: The audio is mixed, mastered, and ready for daily practice. Everything happens automatically: no recording studios, no editing, no technical skills required.
page.step3Desc: Each morning, press play and hear your own voice guide you. Research shows consistent self-voice repetition creates measurable neural change within 21–66 days.
page.step3Detail: Practice is always free. No subscriptions, no replay limits, no pressure. Just you and your voice, building the identity you've chosen — one morning at a time.
page.testimonialQuote: "The first app that actually made me feel like I was talking to myself."
page.contentTypesParagraph: Not interchangeable. Each type is engineered for a specific level of inner change, from daily reprogramming to permanent identity encoding.
page.affirmationsDesc: Short, powerful statements voiced in your own words. Listen each morning to reprogram the beliefs that shape every decision you make.
page.affirmationsScience: Spaced repetition + personal voice = faster neural rewiring.
page.meditationsDesc: AI-scripted journeys designed for your emotional goals, voiced by you. You hear your own voice guide you to exactly where you need to go.
page.meditationsScience: Theta brainwave entrainment for deep state change.
page.ritualsDesc: Multi-part practices combining breathwork, visualization, and affirmations, all voiced by you. Hearing yourself through the deepest work is what makes it stick.
page.ritualsScience: Somatic + cognitive integration for lasting identity shift.
page.dailyPracticeTitle: Day and night. A practice that changes everything.
page.dailyPracticeParagraph: After waking up. Before sleep. Your voice bookends the day — with theta-wave calm at night.
page.thetaNote: Theta waves (4–8 Hz) dominate sleep onset and deep relaxation. Evening meditation increases theta power — helping you wind down and sleep better.
page.minuteCardTitle: Just 5 minutes morning and night. That's all it takes.
page.minuteCardParagraph: Affirmations after waking up set your day. Meditations before sleep help theta waves (4–8 Hz) support relaxation and memory consolidation. No new schedule. No lifestyle overhaul. Just two bookends that compound over time.
page.scienceTitle: Built on how brains actually change.
page.scienceParagraph1: The brain rewires itself through repeated exposure to emotionally resonant stimuli. No stimulus is more resonant to your brain than your own voice.
page.scienceParagraph2: Hear yourself say "I am confident" daily for 21 days and your neural pathways literally change. Not metaphorically. Measurably.
page.scienceBullet1Desc: to notice the first measurable shift
page.scienceBullet2Desc: for new patterns to become fully automatic
page.scienceBullet3Desc: activates deeper neural pathways than any other
page.voiceCloningParagraph: Record 60 seconds of your natural voice. waQup clones it, then voices everything you create. Your own voice reminding you who you already are.
page.testimonial1Quote: The first app that actually made me feel like I was talking to myself. Hearing MY voice tell me I'm capable hits so differently than reading it off a screen.
page.testimonial2Quote: After 30 days of morning affirmations, I can't believe who I'm becoming. I speak up in meetings now. I didn't think an app could actually do this to me.
page.testimonial3Quote: I've tried every meditation app out there. waQup is the only one that feels truly personal. The ritual creation flow is like therapy on demand, but it's mine.
page.beforeAfterTitle: Something in you knows it's time.
page.before1: Replaying the same limiting stories in your head
page.before2: Generic meditations made for strangers, not you
page.before3: Inconsistent practice that never quite sticks
page.before5: Waiting for the "right moment" that never comes
page.after1: Your own voice guides you to who you're becoming
page.after2: Content crafted around your exact challenges and goals
page.after3: A ritual so personal it becomes non-negotiable
page.after4: Shifts you can feel after just 21 days
page.after5: Ready in minutes. Practiced forever, free.
page.faqSubtitle: Everything you want to know before you begin.
page.faq1Q: How is waQup different from Headspace or Calm?
page.faq1A: Headspace and Calm give you generic content made by strangers. waQup creates personalized content based on YOUR specific goals, challenges, and context, voiced in your own cloned voice. Nothing is generic. Everything is yours.
page.faq2Q: Do I need to record my own voice?
page.faq2A: No. Record 60 seconds of your voice. waQup clones it — or choose from professional voices. Your choice.
page.faq3A: Qs are the credits used to create new content. You earn Qs when you sign up and can purchase more. One thing worth knowing: listening to and practicing your existing content is always 100% free. Qs are only spent during creation.
page.faq4A: Yes. Once your affirmations, meditations, or rituals are created, you can replay them as many times as you want, forever, for free. We believe daily practice should never be gated behind a paywall.
page.faq5Q: What are the three content types?
page.faq5A: Affirmations are short 2–5 min cognitive re-patterning statements for morning routines. Guided Meditations are 10–30 min AI-scripted sessions for state induction. Rituals are 20–60 min multi-part practices for the deepest identity transformation.
page.faq6Q: What is the science behind this?
page.faq6A: waQup is built on neuroplasticity research: the brain's ability to rewire itself through repeated exposure. Hearing positive self-statements in your own voice activates deeper neural pathways than reading or hearing a stranger's voice.
page.ctaSubtext: Join the waitlist and be first to access waQup. No credit card required. Practice is always free — Qs only power creation.
page.mockupChatQ: What's your biggest challenge right now?
page.mockupChatA: Self-doubt when I speak up at work
